## Description

Fixes # (issue number, if applicable)

## Type of change

Mark all that apply with `[x]`:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Data update (raw or processed dataset)
- [ ] Analysis notebook update
- [ ] Ethics or instrument document update
- [ ] Repository maintenance (CI, dependencies, .gitignore, etc.)

## Component

Which part of Torddis does this PR affect? (mark all that apply)

- [ ] Mobile application (`src/mobile-app/`)
- [ ] IoT device firmware (`src/iot-device/`)
- [ ] Back-end (`src/backend/`)
- [ ] AI recognition modules (`src/ai-modules/`)
- [ ] Analysis notebooks (`analysis/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`, `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] Data (`data/`)
- [ ] Instruments (`instruments/`)
- [ ] Ethics (`ethics/`)
- [ ] GitHub configuration (`.github/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style used in the affected directory (PEP 8 for Python, Google Java Style for Android, LLVM/clang-format for firmware).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the relevant `README.md` inside the affected directory (if applicable).
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or lint errors.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where relevant.
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally.
- [ ] This PR does **not** introduce personal data of participants.

## Ethics and privacy

Does this PR involve any of the following? (mark with `[x]`)

- [ ] Changes to the data-collection instruments (`instruments/`).
- [ ] Addition or modification of participant data (`data/`).
- [ ] Changes to the informed-consent or minor-assent templates.
- [ ] Changes that could affect the risk profile documented in `ethics/privacy-impact-assessment.md`.
